'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 54''' was the fifty-fourth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[January 8]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|The Trade Federation Attack]]
*[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala's]] [[Handmaiden/Legends|Handmaidens]]

*[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]
*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]—[[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]]
*[[J9 worker drone/Legends|J9 Worker Drone]]
*[[ELG-3A blaster pistol/Legends|Amidala's Blaster]]
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Landspeeder/Legends|Landspeeder]]
